title: Deezer releases a free tool to detect AI-generated music in playlists
friendlyTitle: Deezer lets listeners check playlists for AI music
summary: Deezer launched a free online detector that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, YouTube Music, and other platforms for AI-generated tracks. The company says AI music is now a large share of daily uploads to Deezer, though a much smaller share of actual listening.
friendlySummary: Deezer launched a free tool that checks playlists from major music platforms and flags AI-generated songs. It builds on Deezer’s wider effort to label and limit synthetic music spam.
whyItMatters: Music platforms are becoming a test case for AI transparency, fraud controls, and creator compensation. A user-facing detector gives listeners more visibility into synthetic content that may otherwise blend into recommendations.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Listeners and artists both need clearer labels as AI music grows. This tool gives people more control over what they are hearing and sharing.
